string.name: app_function_access_settings_title
string.description: The title of the entry for App Function Access Settings

string.name: app_function_access_settings_summary
string.description: The summary of the entry for App Function Access Settings, which describes the page contents

resources.string: Perform actions on your device and in other apps

string.name: app_function_agent_list_summary
string.description: The summary of the App Function Agent list Settings, which describes the page contents

resources.string: Assistant apps that can access apps and device functions on your device

string.name: app_function_agent_list_empty
string.description: Label when there are no agent apps available for app function agent list

resources.string: You don’t currently have any agent apps.

string.name: app_function_agent_access_summary
string.description: The summary of the App Function Agent Access Settings, which describes the page contents

resources.string: Apps and system settings %1$s can access to perform actions

string.name: app_function_agent_access_empty
string.description: Label when there are no target apps available for app function agent access

resources.string: You don’t currently have any target apps.

string.name: app_function_target_access_summary
string.description: The summary of the App Function Target Access Settings, which describes the page contents

resources.string: These agents can perform actions in %1$s.

string.name: app_function_target_access_empty
string.description: Label when there are no agent apps available for app function agent access

resources.string: You don’t currently have any agent apps.
